title: Shudehill Giftware Happy Garden Table Plaque Decorative Wooden Sign Welcome Life Is Better Mum Nan Happy Place Rustic Home Ornament Gift (Nan: 10.2 cm (H) x 10.5 cm (W) x 7.3 cm (D))
features: Charming Garden Design: Each plaque features a rustic wooden base with colorful garden-themed decorations like houses, boots, watering cans, and flowers.

Inspirational Quotes: Includes uplifting messages such as “Welcome to our garden”, “Life is better in the garden”, “My Garden is my happy place”, “Mum’s garden, love grows here”, and “Nan’s garden, love grows here”.
Durable Wooden Construction: Made from quality wood for long-lasting use indoors.
Ideal Gift: A thoughtful present for gardeners, mums, nans, and anyone who loves outdoor spaces.
Versatile Decoration: Perfect for tables, shelves, or as a cheerful accent in any setting.
description: Add a touch of charm to your outdoor space with the Happy Garden Table Plaque Collection, featuring delightful wooden signs with uplifting garden quotes. Perfect for patios, tables, or shelves, these plaques combine rustic wood bases with colorful garden-themed decorations like houses, boots, watering cans, and flowers. Each plaque carries a heartwarming message such as “Welcome to our garden”, “Life is better in the garden”, “My Garden is my happy place”, “Mum’s garden, love grows here”, and “Nan’s garden, love grows here”. Ideal as gifts for gardeners or as decorative accents for your home. Each plaque has a rustic, natural wood finish and vibrant illustrations in pastel tones. Features: Designs Available: Welcome, Life Is Better, Happy Place, Mum, Nan Material: Durable wood with printed text and colorful accents Dimensions: Welcome: 18 cm (H) x 4.5 cm (W) x 15.5 cm (D) Life Is Better: 21 cm (H) x 4.5 cm (W) x 15.5 cm (D) Happy Place: 10.7 cm (H) x 8.7 cm (W) x 6.5 cm (D) Mum: 18 cm (H) x 4.5 cm (W) x 15.5 cm (D) Nan: 10.2 cm (H) x 10.5 cm (W) x 7.3 cm (D) Perfect Gift: For garden lovers, mums, and nans Indoor Use: Ideal for tables, shelves
